message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam class {
    BackgroundColor white
    BorderColor black
    ArrowColor black
}
skinparam interface {
    BackgroundColor white
    BorderColor black
    ArrowColor black
}
skinparam actor {
    BackgroundColor white
    BorderColor black
    ArrowColor black
}
skinparam database {
    BackgroundColor white
    BorderColor black
    ArrowColor black
}

package "app" {
    package "controllers" {
        class "ClassController" as ClassController {
            - obj : ObservableList<Attendance>
            - col_add : TableColumn<Class, Button>
            - col_att : TableColumn<Class, String>
            - col_del : TableColumn<Class, Button>
            - col_id : TableColumn<Class, Integer>
            - col_name : TableColumn<Class, String>
            - col_teacher : TableColumn<Class, String>
            - col_update : TableColumn<Class, Button>
            - tableView : TableView<Class>
            + initialize()
            + addClass()
            + home()
            + initialize()
            + refresh()
            + home()
            + listStudents()
        }
        class "DashboardController" as DashboardController {
            - objAtt : ObservableList<Attendance>
            - objSt : ObservableList<StudentList>
            - classId : Label
            - col_add : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
            - col_attBtn : TableColumn<Attendance, Button>
            - col_attend : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - col_del : TableColumn<Attendance, Button>
            - col_id : TableColumn<Attendance, Integer>
            - col_name : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - col_studentAtt : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
            - col_studentName : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
            - col_studentNum : TableColumn<StudentList, String>
            - col_teacher : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - col_teacherAtt : TableColumn<Attendance, String>
            - col_update : TableColumn<Attendance, Button>
            - homeView : Label
            - stTable : TableView<StudentList>
            - tableView : TableView<Attendance>
            - table : TableView<Attendance>
        }
        class "HomeController" as HomeController {
            + initialize()
            + home()
        }
        class "LoginController" as LoginController {
            - pf_pass : PasswordField
            - tf_email : TextField
            + initialize()
            + login()
        }
        class "OptionController" as OptionController {
            - objAtt : ObservableList<Attendance>
            - objClass : ObservableList<Class>
            - objSt : ObservableList<StudentList>
            - col_addBtn : TableColumn<User, Button>
            - col_delBtn : TableColumn<User, Button>
            - col_Email : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_Fullname : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_id : TableColumn<User, Integer>
            - col_Password : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_updateBtn : TableColumn<User, Button>
            - tableView : TableView<User>
            + initialize()
            + addNewTeacher()
            + home()
        }
        class "RegisterController" as RegisterController {
            - pf_confirm : PasswordField
            - pf_password : PasswordField
            - tf_email : TextField
            - tf_fullname : TextField
            - tf_lastname : TextField
            + login()
            + register()
        }
        class "StudentController" as StudentController {
            - objAtt : ObservableList<Attendance>
            - objAttendee : ObservableList<User>
            - col_attendee : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_attendeeName : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_attendeeNum : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_id : TableColumn<User, Integer>
            - col_name : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_teacher : TableColumn<User, String>
            - col_updateBtn : TableColumn<User, Button>
            - tableView : TableView<User>
            + initialize()
            + addNewStudent()
            + home()
        }
        class "TimetableController" as TimetableController {
            - list : ObservableList<Timetable>
            - col_id : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_hour : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_mon : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_tue : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_wed : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_thu : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_fri : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_sat : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - col_sun : TableColumn<Timetable, String>
            - table : TableView<Timetable>
            - week_drop : ChoiceBox<String>
            - year_drop : ChoiceBox<String>
            + initialize()
            + listTable()
            + home()
            + update()
        }
        class "UpdateController" as UpdateController {
            - btn_delete : Button
            - btn_update : Button
            - drop_class : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_class1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_day : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_day1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_end : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - drop_hour : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - drop_start : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - drop_start1 : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - drop_teacher : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_week : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_year : ChoiceBox<String>
            - drop_year1 : ChoiceBox<String>
            - tf_class : ChoiceBox<String>
            - tf_day : ChoiceBox<String>
            - tf_end : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - tf_hour : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - tf_start : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - tf_teacher : ChoiceBox<String>
            - tf_week : ChoiceBox<String>
            - tf_year : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            + ClassList()
            + ClassList1()
            + DayList()
            + EndList()
            + HourList()
            + WeekList()
            + YearList()
            + addTimetable()
            + deleteTimetable()
            + home()
            + hourEndList()
            + hourStartList()
            + updateTimetable()
        }
        class "newClassController" as newClassController {
            - drop_teacher : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - lbl_number : Label
            - tf_acth : TextField
            - tf_class : TextField
            - tf_semester : TextField
            + initialize()
            + addClass()
            + setLabel()
        }
        class "newStudentController" as newStudentController {
            - tf_email : TextField
            - tf_fullname : TextField
            - tf_index : TextField
            - tf_lastname : TextField
            + initialize()
            + addStudent()
        }
        class "updateClassController" as updateClassController {
            - drop_teacher : ChoiceBox<Integer>
            - lbl_number : Label
            - tf_acth : TextField
            - tf_class : TextField
            - tf_semester : TextField
            + initialize()
            + update()
            + updateClass()
        }
        class "updateStudentController" as updateStudentController {
            - modif : AnchorPane
            - pf_password : PasswordField
            - tf_email : TextField
            - tf_fullname : TextField
            - tf_index : TextField
            - tf_lastname : TextField
            + initialize()
            + verifyUser()
            + updateStudent()
        }
        class "updateTeacherController" as updateTeacherController {
            - pf_confirm : PasswordField
            - pf_password : PasswordField
            - modif : AnchorPane
            - tf_email : TextField
            - tf_fullname : TextField
            - tf_index : TextField
            - tf_lastname : TextField
            + initialize()
            + verifyUser()
            + updateTeacher()
        }
    }
}

package "javafx" {
    interface "Initializable" as Initializable {
    }
}

actor "user" as user

user --> HomeController
user --> LoginController
user --> RegisterController
user --> ClassController
user --> DashboardController
user --> OptionController
user --> StudentController
user --> TimetableController
user --> UpdateController
user --> newClassController
user --> newStudentController
user --> updateClassController
user --> updateStudentController
user --> updateTeacherController

ClassController ..|> Initializable
DashboardController ..|> Initializable
HomeController ..|> Initializable
LoginController ..|> Initializable
OptionController ..|> Initializable
RegisterController ..|> Initializable
StudentController ..|> Initializable
TimetableController ..|> Initializable
UpdateController ..|> Initializable
newClassController ..|> Initializable
newStudentController ..|> Initializable
updateClassController ..|> Initializable
updateStudentController ..|> Initializable
updateTeacherController ..|> Initializable

@enduml
```
